description: 125 - 12-03-2025 - Email from Peter Mandelson to Sir Oliver Robbins (former Permanent  Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO) and others From:  Sent: 12 March 2025 16:15 To: Oliver Robbin

participants.name: Email from Peter Mandelson to Sir Oliver Robbins
participants.role: former Permanent  Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs

text:
Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO) and others
From: 
Sent: 12 March 2025 16:15
To: Oliver Robbins ; Ailsa Terry (No.10) ; Ninjeri Pandit ; Jonathan Powell 
Cc: Victoria Busby ; Scott Furssedonn-Wood ; James Roscoe ; Peter Mandelson 
Subject: LIMDIS: HMA Washington to PUS and PS/PM, US State Visit
PUS, Ailsa,
Please see the below message from HMA Washington regarding the proposed US state visit 
(SV).
BEGINS
Dear Olly, dear Ailsa,
My team returned to the White House today to discuss, at their request, the PM's State Visit 
invitation from The King.
ENDS
Best wishes,
 | Chief of Staff to His Majesty's Ambassador | British Embassy 
Washington
3100 Massachusetts Avenue NW, Washington, DC 20008 | 
 | Mobile: 
+
JCS
***
JCS

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY
From: Ed Llewellyn 
Sent: Tuesday, March 11, 2025 1:55 PM
To: Ailsa Terry (No.10) ; 
 ; 
 
Subject: Personal: Meloni/Ukraine etc - a sitrep from Rome
Ailsa, 
A quick snapshot from here –  just over a week after Meloni's meeting with the PM and 
Lancaster House. Both seem an age ago already, as they must do even more to you.
